forbidden.message: Abstraction and generated-style layers must not reference ClosedXML directly. Depend on IExcelReportService instead.
Abstraction and generated-style layers must not use ClosedXML workbook APIs.
Abstraction and generated-style layers must not reference alternate Excel libraries directly.
Abstraction and generated-style layers must not perform direct filesystem operations for report generation.
Abstraction and generated-style layers must not construct HttpClient directly.
Host layer should register the adapter, not use ClosedXML APIs directly.
Host layer should not manipulate Excel workbooks directly.
Host layer should not reference alternate Excel libraries directly.
Host layer should use injected clients or platform abstractions instead of constructing HttpClient directly.
ClosedXmlAdapter must not mix alternate Excel libraries.
ClosedXmlAdapter should generate reports in memory rather than writing to the local filesystem.
ClosedXmlAdapter must not construct HttpClient directly.
